title: Use unpredictable salts for password hashing
description: Password hashing without proper salts or with predictable salts is vulnerable to rainbow table attacks. Weak salts compromise the security of password storage and make it easier for attackers to crack passwords.
recommendation: Use cryptographically secure random salts that are unique for each password.

noncompliant.description: Using no salt, static salts, or predictable salts makes passwords vulnerable to rainbow table attacks.

compliant.description: Using cryptographically secure random salts that are unique for each password, preferably with bcrypt.

checks.message: Use cryptographically secure random salts that are unique for each password
